title: Lowercase coupon codes 500 at checkout
product_summary: Acme Store checkout service (Node/Express): carts, shipping quotes, coupon redemption, order placement

ground_truth.root_cause: getCoupon() in src/coupons.js only trims the code and never uppercases it, despite the marketing emails printing codes lowercase; the lookup misses and applyCoupon throws, surfacing as a 500 on POST /api/cart/:id/coupon.
ground_truth.fix_contract: Coupon codes must be accepted case-insensitively; applying 'save10' to an 8400-cent cart returns 7560. Unknown codes must still error cleanly (thrown Error / non-2xx), not silently apply.
expected_evidence: $exception events with message 'Unknown coupon: save10' concentrated after the campaign send
coupon_applied events only for uppercase codes
funnel drop between coupon_attempted and checkout_completed starting with the campaign send
